015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.config.store;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.*;
027
028/**
029 * Classpath-based storage location for configuration files.
030 *
031 * <p>
032 * Looks inside the JVM classpath for configuration files.
033 *
034 * <p>
035 * Configuration files retrieved from the classpath can be modified but not persisted.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
043   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
044})
045public class ClasspathStore extends ConfigStore {
046
047   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
048   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
049
050   /**
051    * Builder class.
052    */
053   public static class Builder extends ConfigStore.Builder<Builder> {
054
055      /**
056       * Constructor, default settings.
057       */
058      protected Builder() {}
059
060      /**
061       * Copy constructor.
062       *
063       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
064       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
065       */
066      protected Builder(Builder copyFrom) {
067         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
068      }
069
070      /**
071       * Copy constructor.
072       *
073       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
074       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
075       */
076      protected Builder(ClasspathStore copyFrom) {
077         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
078         type(copyFrom.getClass());
079      }
080
081      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
082      public ClasspathStore build() {
083         return build(ClasspathStore.class);
084      }
085
086      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
087      public Builder copy() {
088         return new Builder(this);
089      }
090
091   }
092
093   /** Default memory store, all default values.*/
094   public static final ClasspathStore DEFAULT = ClasspathStore.create().build();
095
096   /**
097    * Creates a new builder for this object.
098    *
099    * @return A new builder.
100    */
101   public static Builder create() {
102      return new Builder();
103   }
104
105   private final ConcurrentHashMap<String,String> cache = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
106
107   /**
108    * Constructor.
109    *
110    * @param builder The builder for this object.
111    */
112   public ClasspathStore(Builder builder) {
113      super(builder);
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * No-op.
118    */
119   @Override /* Overridden from Closeable */
120   public void close() throws IOException {
121      // No-op
122   }
123
124   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
125   public Builder copy() {
126      return new Builder(this);
127   }
128
129   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
130   public synchronized boolean exists(String name) {
131      try {
132         return ! read(name).isEmpty();
133      } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") IOException e) {
134         return false;
135      }
136   }
137
138   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
139   public synchronized String read(String name) throws IOException {
140      var s = cache.get(name);
141      if (nn(s))
142         return s;
143
144      var cl = Thread.currentThread().getContextClassLoader();
145      try (var in = cl.getResourceAsStream(name)) {
146         if (nn(in))
147            cache.put(name, IoUtils.read(in));
148      }
149      return emptyIfNull(cache.get(name));
150   }
151
152   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
153   public synchronized ClasspathStore update(String name, String newContents) {
154      if (newContents == null)
155         cache.remove(name);
156      else
157         cache.put(name, newContents);
158      super.update(name, newContents);
159      return this;
160   }
161
162   @Override /* Overridden from ConfigStore */
163   public synchronized String write(String name, String expectedContents, String newContents) throws IOException {
164
165      // This is a no-op.
166      if (eq(expectedContents, newContents))
167         return null;
168
169      var currentContents = read(name);
170
171      if (nn(expectedContents) && neq(currentContents, expectedContents))
172         return currentContents;
173
174      update(name, newContents);
175
176      return null;
177   }
178}
